summary: Comprehensive testing of CRA Construtora Admin Module completed successfully. All backend APIs (31/31 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@test.com / password - 200 OK
Backend: Login with invalid credentials - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard - returns stats and contasProximas
Backend: Dashboard requires authentication - 401/403
Backend: CRUD Contas a Pagar - Create, Read, Update, Mark as Paid, Delete
Backend: CRUD Contas a Receber - Create, Read, Update, Mark as Received, Delete
Backend: CRUD Fornecedores - Create, Read, Update, Delete
Backend: CRUD Produtos - Create, Read, Update, Delete
Backend: CRUD Ordens de Serviço - Create, Read, Update, Update Status, Delete
Backend: CRUD Plano de Contas - Create, Read, Update, Delete
Frontend: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Frontend: Navigation to /select-system page works
Frontend: System selection cards (Gerenciamento Geral, Administrativo) clickable
Frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with correct stats display
Frontend: Contas a Pagar page loads with filters (Todas, Pendentes, Vencidas, Pagas)
Frontend: Contas a Pagar modal opens for new entry
Frontend: Contas a Receber page loads with filters (Todas, Pendentes, Atrasadas, Recebidas)
Frontend: Contas a Receber modal opens for new entry
Frontend: Fornecedores page loads with search
Frontend: Produtos page loads with search
Frontend: Ordens de Serviço page loads with status filters
Frontend: Plano de Contas page loads with Receitas/Despesas sections
Frontend: NF-e page shows placeholder with SEFAZ integration message
Frontend: 'Trocar Sistema' button navigates to /select-system
Frontend: Mobile navigation works (bottom nav bar)
Frontend: Mobile 'Mais' page shows additional options
Frontend: Sidebar scroll works with small screen height (500px)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during backend testing (TEST_ prefixed items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin module fully implemented and tested. All CRUD operations for Contas a Pagar, Contas a Receber, Fornecedores, Produtos, Ordens de Serviço, and Plano de Contas working. NF-e page is a placeholder (requires SEFAZ integration). Mobile navigation working. Sidebar scroll fixed. Two modules: Gerenciamento Geral (orange) and Administrativo (blue) accessible via /select-system page.

admin_dashboard.stats_display: Working - Shows totalPagar, totalReceber, saldoPrevisto, contasVencidas, notasEmitidas, fornecedores, produtos, ordensAbertas

fornecedores.search: Working - Search by nome, CNPJ, cidade

produtos.search: Working - Search by nome, código, categoria

ordens_servico.filters: Working - Todas, Abertas, Em Andamento, Concluídas

nfe.status: Placeholder - Requires SEFAZ integration and digital certificate

navigation.system_select: Working - /select-system page with two system cards
navigation.trocar_sistema: Working - Button navigates back to system select
navigation.mobile_nav: Working - Bottom navigation bar with Início, A Pagar, A Receber, NF-e, Mais
navigation.sidebar_scroll: Working - Scrollable with small screen height
